title: Hiro's Animal Friends Love Food
synopsis: Little Hiro discovers what his animal friends love to eat in this delightful food adventure filled with colorful fruits, vegetables, and treats.

pages.text: Hiro loves food! He sees a bunny.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face stands in a colorful garden holding a giant orange carrot with magical sparkles. A fluffy white bunny sits nearby with steam rising from fresh vegetables around them.
illustration.alt: Hiro holding a sparkling carrot next to a white bunny in a garden

pages.text: Carrots! Crunch, crunch! The bunny is happy.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face watches a bunny eating an enormous glowing carrot with exaggerated proportions. Orange sparkles and steam swirl around the magical food scene.
illustration.alt: A bunny eating a large magical carrot while Hiro watches

pages.text: Hiro sees a monkey. Bananas! Yellow and sweet!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face stands under a tree with a playful monkey holding oversized golden bananas that sparkle with magical food energy and dripping honey steam.
illustration.alt: Hiro and a monkey with large sparkling bananas in a tree

pages.text: Fish swim. Fish love tiny food bits. Yum!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face peers into a magical pond where colorful fish swim around floating food flakes that shimmer with sparkles and create rainbow steam bubbles.
illustration.alt: Hiro watching fish eat sparkling food in a pond

pages.text: Hiro is hungry too! Time to eat together!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits at a magical feast table with the bunny, monkey, and fish bowl nearby, surrounded by exaggerated colorful foods with steam, sparkles, and celebration joy.
illustration.alt: Hiro having a feast with all his animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does the bunny eat?
questions.explanation: The bunny loves to eat crunchy orange carrots!

questions.question: What color are bananas?
questions.explanation: Bananas are yellow and sweet, just like the monkey loves!

questions.question: Who eats with Hiro at the end?
questions.explanation: Hiro shares food with all his animal friends - the bunny, monkey, and fish!
